intent_head: Whose birthday is coming up next? If multiple people share that next birthday date, list all of them. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree, AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system before task work, and used canonical cast record for identity/birthday.
function.outcome_justification: Context date is 2026-03-02. Cast birthday search showed the nearest upcoming month/day is 04-04, and only 10_entities/cast/petra.md has that date. The canonical file names the person as Petra Novak.
